ab: kemuda u mukuwa i talraviyaw?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: kemuda u mukuwa i sizir?
mipalizing ku mukuwa i talraviyaw.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: mipalizing ku mukuwa i sizir.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: kemuda mukuwa i biyoing i intaw?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: kemakawang mukuwa i biyoing i intaw.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: kemuda u mukuwa i Penghu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: muitras ku za hikuki mukuwa i Penghu.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: kemuda u mukuwa i Penghu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: muitras ku za sudang mukuwa i Penghu.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: muitras u za eman muruma’?
en: How do you go home?

ab: muitras ku za ciē-yun muruma’.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: muitras za eman mukuwa i takesiyan i Panay?
en: How does Panay go to school?

ab: muitras za kisiya mukuwa i takesiyan i Panay.
en: Panay goes to school by train.

ab: muitras za eman mukuwa i kiyukay i Kacaw?
en: How does Kacaw go to church?

ab: mizidēnsiya mukuwa i kiyukay i Kacaw.
en: Kacaw goes to church by bicycle.

ab: muitras u za ciē-yun mukuwa i takesiyan?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: amelri, muitras ku za bas mukuwa i takesiyan.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: mizidēnsiya u mukuwa i takesiyan?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: ai, mizidēnsiya ku mukuwa i takesiyan.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: muitras u za kaw-tiē mukuwa i Takaw?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: ai, muitras ku za kaw-tiē mukuwa i Takaw.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: muitras u za kisiya nu ’azi mu za hikuki mukuwa i Valangaw?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: muitras ku za hikuki, maradika na hikuki kana kisiya nu muitras ta.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: muitras u za bas nu ’azi mu mipalizing u mukuwa i kiyukay?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: mipalizing ku mukuwa i kiyukay, marakalre’ayan nu mipalizing ta kana muitras za bas.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: adalrep a caw-se i kanmu?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: ’azi kaadalrepan, miotobay ku nu mukuwa ku kana caw-se.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: adalrep na yuvingkiyok kana takesiyan?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: adalrep, kemakawang ta mu, raredek ta.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: adalrep na aekaekanan kana siyataw?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: mupatraran ta kemay kana siyataw zi kemakawang ta za lruwatra pung mu, raredek ta.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
